# FR 2052a Regulatory Reference

> Machine-readable reference for the Federal Reserve's FR 2052a Complex Institution Liquidity Monitoring Report. Covers all 147 sections across 13 categories and 3 reporting pillars with structured definitions, data fields, enumerated values, and cross-references.

## What this site is

This site provides both a human-browsable interface and a machine-queryable API for the FR 2052a report — the Federal Reserve's daily and monthly liquidity monitoring form for large U.S. banking organizations.

It is designed to help compliance teams, regulatory technology tools, and AI agents understand:
- Which transactions belong in which reporting sections
- What data fields each section requires
- How sections cross-reference each other and other regulations (LCR, Reg D, Basel III, etc.)

## Form overview

- **Form:** FR 2052a — Complex Institution Liquidity Monitoring Report
- **Authority:** Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
- **OMB Control Number:** 7100-0361
- **Current version:** 2025-02-26
- **Respondent panel:** U.S. BHCs, SLHCs, and FBOs with $100B+ total consolidated assets (Reg YY Category I-IV)
- **Frequency:** Daily (Category I-III G-SIBs and high short-term wholesale funding), Monthly (Category III-IV)

## Content structure

### Inflows (4 categories)
- **I.A** — Assets (liquid asset inventory, unencumbered securities)
- **I.U** — Unsecured Inflows (deposits placed, interbank lending)
- **I.S** — Secured Inflows (repo, securities lending)
- **I.O** — Other Inflows (derivatives, FX, other)

### Outflows (4 categories)
- **O.W** — Wholesale Outflows (unsecured wholesale funding)
- **O.S** — Secured Outflows (secured wholesale funding, FHLB)
- **O.D** — Deposit Outflows (retail and operational deposits)
- **O.O** — Other Outflows (derivatives, commitments, other)

### Supplemental (5 categories)
- **S.DC** — Derivatives and Collateral
- **S.L** — Liquidity Risk Measurement (LCR, NSFR)
- **S.B** — Balance Sheet
- **S.I** — Informational
- **S.FX** — Foreign Exchange

## API

All endpoints accept GET requests and return JSON (unless otherwise noted). CORS enabled on all routes.

### Query-parameter endpoints

| Endpoint | Parameters | Description |
|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `/api/search` | `q=<query>` | Full-text search across all sections |
| `/api/section` | `id=<section_id>` | Full section by ID |
| `/api/map` | `product=<description>` | Map a product to reporting sections |
| `/api/fields` | `id=<section_or_category_id>` | Data fields for a section or category |
| `/api/enums` | `field=<field_name>` | Enumerated values for a field |
| `/api/xref` | `id=<section_or_regulation>` | Cross-reference resolution |
| `/api/diff` | `id=<section_id>&from=<date>&to=<date>` | Version comparison |
| `/api/schema` | `id=<section_id>` | Structured frontmatter only |
| `/api/filter` | `pillar=&category=&has_field=&field_value=` | Filter sections |
| `/api/export` | `scope=<all/pillar/category/section>&format=<json/yaml/md>` | Bulk export |
| `/api/glossary` | `term=<term>` | Glossary lookup |
| `/api/morphir` | `query=<rule_or_section>` | Morphir LCR rule mapping |
| `POST /api/morphir/classify` | JSON body: `{ flow, date? }` | Classify a flow against all LCR rules |
| `POST /api/morphir/compute` | JSON body: `{ hqla_flows, outflow_flows, inflow_flows, reporting_date }` | Compute full LCR ratio with rule-level drill-down |
| `POST /api/morphir/stress` | JSON body: `{ hqla_flows, outflow_flows, inflow_flows, reporting_date, adjustments }` | Base vs. stressed LCR comparison |

### Path-parameter endpoints (REST-style)

```
GET /api/section/{id}
GET /api/fields/{id}
GET /api/enums/{field}
GET /api/xref/{query}
GET /api/diff/{id}
GET /api/schema/{id}
GET /api/export/{scope}
GET /api/glossary/{term}
GET /api/search/{q}
GET /api/map/{product}
GET /api/morphir/{query}
```

### Raw Markdown convention

Append `.md` to any section URL to get the raw Markdown+frontmatter source:

```
GET /inflows/i-a/i-a-1.md
GET /api/raw-md?id=I.A.1
```

## MCP server

Ships an MCP server for Claude Desktop integration. See `/mcp/README.md`.

Tools: fr2052a_search, fr2052a_show, fr2052a_map, fr2052a_fields, fr2052a_enums, fr2052a_xref, fr2052a_diff, fr2052a_schema, fr2052a_filter, fr2052a_export, fr2052a_glossary, fr2052a_morphir, fr2052a_classify_flow, fr2052a_compute_lcr, fr2052a_stress_test

## Source

FR 2052a PDF: https://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/reportingforms/Report/Index/FR_2052a
OMB Control Number: 7100-0361
